prompt: Generate several speedometer infographics to depict website traffic growth over several years. Use the blue color palette from the reference image for the speedometer infographics, including simple, related minimalist icons.
prompt_refined: Generate four speedometer infographics, arranged as a comparative series, each designed to visually represent website traffic growth for a different year. Apply the distinct blue color palette from image 1 for all speedometer elements, including the dials, needles, and text labels. Each speedometer should incorporate a simple, minimalist line-art icon related to website traffic (e.g., a browser window, a network symbol, or an upward trend arrow), matching the clean aesthetic of the router and globe icons present in image 1.
objects: Speedometer dials (using the blue color palette from image 1)
Speedometer needles (using the blue color palette from image 1)
Speedometer text labels (using the blue color palette from image 1)
Simple, minimalist line-art icons related to website traffic (e.g., browser window, network symbol, upward trend arrow)
Distinct year labels for each speedometer
Comparative series arrangement for the speedometers
